mapper.sql: id, tool_code, tool_name, category, description, input_schema::text as input_schema, output_schema::text as output_schema, is_builtin, is_enabled, sort_order, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ai_atomic_tools WHERE tool_code = #{toolCode} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_atomic_tools ( tool_code, tool_name, category, description, input_schema, output_schema, is_builtin, is_enabled, sort_order, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{toolCode}, #{toolName}, #{category}, #{description}, #{inputSchema}::jsonb, #{outputSchema}::jsonb, #{isBuiltin}, #{isEnabled}, #{sortOrder}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: DELETE FROM ai_atomic_tools WHERE id = #{id} AND is_builtin = '0'
DELETE FROM ai_atomic_tools WHERE is_builtin = '0' AND id IN #{id}
